reviews.comment:
Pongan mas empleados eficientes xfavor, que no vamos a pedir fiado, pagamos la nafta mas cara de latinoamerica y te atiende un zapallo cataculico

Please hire more efficient employees, we're not going to ask for credit. We pay the highest gas prices in Latin America and we get served by a complete idiot.
